opinion.h4: Harold Frank WHITE, petitioner, v. George C. YOUNG, U. S. District Judge for the Middle District of Florida. No. 2038, Misc.
opinion.h2: Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Motion for leave to file petition for rehearing denied.
Mr. Justice MARSHALL and Mr. Justice BLACKMUN took no part in the consideration or decision of this motion.[ White v. Young (1970) ]
